summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Notary Onboarding and BlockchainAuditTrail features. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working - multi-step onboarding form, credential uploads, admin review/approve/reject, and HCS audit trail display.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Multi-step Notary Onboarding form with Personal Info, License Details, and Upload Documents steps
Good: Credential upload working with proper validation of credential types
Good: Admin endpoints properly secured with 403 for non-admin users
Good: Application status workflow (pending -> under_review -> approved/rejected) implemented correctly
Good: Approving notary application updates user role to 'notary'
Good: BlockchainAuditTrail component fetches and displays HCS events with proper timeline UI
Good: HashScan explorer links provided for each HCS topic
Good: Dashboard shows Audit Trail button only for requests with HCS topics
Good: HCS events (REQUEST_CREATED) showing with sequence numbers and timestamps
Good: data-testid attributes present on key components for testing
seed_data_creation: Created notarization request 'Test Contract for Audit Trail' with HCS topic 0.0.7946451 for testing BlockchainAuditTrail component. Test user notarytest@test.com has pending notary profile with uploaded credentials.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Notary Onboarding multi-step form fully working at /notary/onboarding. 2) Test user notarytest@test.com has pending profile with Commission Certificate and Government ID uploaded. 3) BlockchainAuditTrail component displays HCS events with timeline UI. 4) HCS topic 0.0.7946451 created for test notarization request. 5) Admin approve/reject/review endpoints all working with proper role checks. 6) All credential upload types supported: commission_certificate, government_id, e_signature, background_check, ron_certificate.

notary_profile_status.notes: Returns detailed profile status, uploaded credentials, missing required docs

create_notary_profile.notes: Creates profile with extended fields (full_legal_name, phone, address, etc.)

upload_credentials.notes: Supports 5 credential types, validates file size (5MB max)

get_my_credentials.notes: Returns list of uploaded credentials with metadata

admin_review.notes: Marks application as under_review with optional notes

admin_approve.notes: Approves application and updates user role to 'notary'

admin_reject.notes: Rejects with reason, properly stores rejection_reason

admin_view_credentials.notes: Returns notary profile, user info, and credentials list

notary_onboarding_page.notes: Multi-step form with Personal Info, License Details, Upload Documents

blockchain_audit_trail.notes: Displays HCS events with timeline, refresh, HashScan links

dashboard_audit_trail.notes: Shows Audit Trail button for requests with hcs_topic_id
